name: Rahul Mehta
persona: Technical leader focused on scalable infrastructure. Values innovation and proven ROI. Decision maker for technology investments up to $100K. Background: IIT Bombay, ex-Paytm. Pain points: Legacy system modernization, API scalability.

name: Priya Sharma
persona: Product strategist balancing customer needs with business goals. Influencer in vendor selection. Background: IIM Ahmedabad, previously Flipkart. Focus areas: User experience, time-to-market, product differentiation.

name: Vikram Khanna
persona: Risk-focused executive ensuring regulatory compliance. Gatekeeper for financial products. Background: RBI certified, 15+ years in banking. Key concerns: Regulatory approval, data privacy, audit trails.

name: Sarah Chen
persona: Growth-stage technical leader. Balances technical debt with speed. Open to modern solutions. Background: Stanford, ex-Stripe. Interested in: Developer experience, automation, cost efficiency.

name: Mike Johnson
persona: Product-focused executive driving B2B strategy. Values data-driven decisions. Background: Berkeley, ex-Salesforce. Focus: Product-market fit, customer success, growth metrics.

name: Alex Rivera
persona: Early-stage founder wearing multiple hats. Resource-constrained but eager to learn. Background: YC founder, self-taught. Needs: Quick wins, flexible pricing, hands-on support.

name: Jennifer Wu
persona: Enterprise-grade technical leader. Focus on security and compliance. Background: ex-Google, CISSP certified. Priorities: Zero-trust architecture, compliance automation, SOC2.

name: David Park
persona: GDPR and security compliance expert. Technical enough to evaluate solutions. Background: Ex-Deloitte, CIPP certified. Key focus: Audit readiness, data residency, encryption standards.

name: Nina Patel
persona: Infrastructure expert with multi-cloud experience. Cost-conscious but quality-focused. Background: AWS certified, ex-Netflix. Interests: Cost optimization, vendor diversity, developer tools.

name: Chris Lee
persona: Product leader focused on partner ecosystem. Background: ex-Oracle, channel expertise. Focus: Partner integration, marketplace, revenue sharing.

name: Dr. Emily Watson
persona: Healthcare technology expert with clinical background. HIPAA compliance champion. Background: MD/PhD, ex-Mayo Clinic. Focus: Patient data security, clinical workflows, interoperability.

name: Robert Martinez
persona: Healthcare compliance specialist. FDA and HIPAA expert. Background: ex-FDA consultant, CPHIMS certified. Key focus: Regulatory approval, clinical validation, data governance.

name: Kevin Zhang
persona: Blockchain security expert. Balances innovation with regulatory concerns. Background: Ex-Ethereum foundation. Focus: Smart contract security, custody solutions, regulatory compliance.

name: Lisa Thompson
persona: Crypto regulatory specialist. Navigating complex compliance landscape. Background: Ex-SEC, JD/MBA. Focus: AML/KYC, SEC guidance, state licensing.
